headline: Are These 2 Large-Cap Energy Stocks Still Buys After a Massive Run-Up?
summary: Phillips 66 and Halliburton have surged past the oil-energy sector, but softer crude prices and resilient business models may keep the momentum alive.

headline: Oil Price Slide Points To Demand Destruction As Stagflationary Consumer Sentiment Persists Globally
summary: Crude oil slides on demand destruction as EVs and efficiency erode consumption.
